headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Extra Space Storage, Lowers Price Target to $150
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Ki Bin Kim   maintains Extra Space Storage (NYSE:EXR) with a Hold and lowers the price target from $158 to $150.
